muscle_dome.name: Master

reward_first_clear_item.name: War God Icon
reward_first_clear_item.effect: Allows the same attack sequence to fire twice.

muscle_dome.reward_first_clear_requires: Jette must be defeated in Absolute Fortress before the War God Icon is awarded.

prizes.notes: Only appears once you have 100,000 coins.

item.name: Earth Egg
item.effect: Earth defense up; converted by Zalan to Earth Talisman.

item.name: Lost Grail
item.effect: Revives the wearer once when they fall in battle.

item.name: Incense
item.effect: Lowers the random-encounter rate for a short time.

item.name: Fury Boost
item.effect: Boosts the attack gauge for one battle.

item.name: Fury Boost
item.effect: Boosts the attack gauge for one battle.

item.name: Power Elixir
item.effect: Raises Attack of selected character for the battle.

item.name: Shield Elixir
item.effect: Raises Defense of selected character for the battle.

item.name: Speed Elixir
item.effect: Raises Speed of selected character for the battle.

item.name: Phoenix
item.effect: Restores a fallen ally with a small amount of HP.

meta.rules: Reproduce the on-screen button sequence under a time pressure - like rock-paper-scissors with life meters.

secrets.name: Chicken King
secrets.trigger: Run from the first battle in all three Muscle Dome difficulty levels.
secrets.notes: Reward is the Chicken King accessory.

meta.notes:
Sol is a vertical structure with a B2 basement reachable via a service
elevator. The Genesis Tree Seedling side-quest plants the basement; the
Mary's Diary -> Roof Monk -> Art-grant chain bookends the tower; Gaza
fights the party in the Warrior's Square (B2) under a strict set of
unlock conditions documented below.

sections.name: Library
sections.notes: Hidden 'Mary's Diary' item - give to monk on Roof to learn an Art.

sections.name: Warrior's Square
sections.notes: Gaza boss fight. Unlock = defeat Songi in Noaru Valley + Vahn has every Art + Meta is at level 9.

sections.name: Genesis Plot
sections.notes: Plant the Genesis Tree Seedling received from Old Deez on the Roof.

sections.name: Control Room
sections.notes: Story-only - 'There's nothing important here anymore' after the main event.

sections.name: Items Shop 1
sections.notes: Front entrance (back entrance is on F3).

sections.name: Jazz Club
sections.notes: Reunites Cara & Grantes after delivering the Music Score.

sections.name: Muscle Dome
sections.notes: Arena minigame - Beginner / Expert / Master courses.

sections.name: Muscle Dome Counter
sections.notes: Exchange Muscle Dome / Baka Fighter / slot coins for prizes (see casino.toml).

sections.name: Sol Fever Disco
sections.notes: Noa dance-contest minigame. Gold Card required.

sections.name: Sol Broadway
sections.notes: Gala-led theatrical production - free entry on completion.

sections.name: Bakery
sections.notes: Sells Soru Bread at retail (6000 G) - cheaper at Muscle Dome counter (100 coins).

sections.name: Warehouse
sections.notes: Life Grail is sold here at a negotiable 40000-90000 G.

sections.name: Old Deez
sections.notes: Leader of Sol Tower's temple. Gives the Genesis Tree Seedling.

sections.name: Roof Monk
sections.notes: Accepts Mary's Diary and teaches Vahn an Art in return.

sections.name: Gaza fight (alt)
sections.notes: Second Gaza encounter on the Roof, ~20000-22000 HP.

side_quests.name: Mary's Diary
chain: Pick up Mary's Diary in the Sol Tower Library (B2).
Bring it to the monk on the Roof.
side_quests.notes: Acts as both a quest item and the source of an Art.

side_quests.name: Music Score / Jazz Club reunion
chain: Cara in Buma hands over the Music Score (her love song to Grantes).
Bring the Music Score to the piano player in Sol Tower's Jazz Club (F4).
Grantes hands over the Soren Flute (calls a Soren at Mt. Dhini).

reward_item.name: Soren Flute
reward_item.effect: Calls the Soren at Mt. Dhini.

side_quests.notes: Quiet side-quest with mechanical follow-on: the Soren Flute unlocks Mt. Dhini traversal.

side_quests.name: Sol Fever Disco
chain: Buy the Gold Card from the Muscle Dome counter (50 coins).
Enter Sol Fever Disco on F5.
Win the Noa dance contest (two rounds).

reward_item.name: Swimsuit
reward_item.effect: Used while taking pictures at Vidna.

side_quests.notes: Round-by-round button sequence isn't documented externally.

side_quests.name: Sol Broadway
chain: Visit Sol Broadway on F5 with Gala in the party.

side_quests.name: Genesis Tree Seedling
chain: Speak to Old Deez on the Roof to receive the Genesis Tree Seedling.
Plant it in the Sol Tower basement (B2 Genesis Plot).
side_quests.notes: Triggers the post-Sol Tower exit event.

side_quests.name: Warrior's Square (Gaza)
chain: Teach Vahn every Art (regular + Hyper unlocks).
Descend to B2 Warrior's Square to challenge Gaza.
side_quests.notes: Optional fight; Gaza has roughly 24000-25000 HP.
